Doran's younger son (unnamed; betrothed to Myrcella)

Song of love and doom (unnamed; played by Rhaegar on his harp at Griffin's Roost)

mentions.raw_name: Greyscale (advancing on Connington's hand; black nails, grey skin past second knuckle; treated with wine/vinegar soaks)
Robert's Rebellion (referenced: Battle of the Bells at Stoney Sept, Battle of the Trident)
Battle of the Bells (Connington's central failure; detailed flashback)
War of the Five Kings (implicit context: Stannis, ironborn king, Lannister control, Bolton/Frey proxies)
Golden Company's invasion of Westeros (the current campaign)
Siege of Storm's End (Mace Tyrell's, recently abandoned)
Hand of the King (Connington was named Hand by Aerys; Connington will serve as Aegon's Hand)
Captain-General of the Golden Company (Homeless Harry Strickland; previously Myles Toyne, Maelys, Bittersteel)
Knight of Griffin's Roost (title held by Ronnet Connington after Robert stripped the lordship)
Lord of Griffin's Roost (Connington reclaims this)
Kingsguard (Ser Rolly Duckfield appointed by Aegon)
Elephants (Golden Company war elephants; three arrive with Aegon, rest missing with the fleet)
